privileged_info_summary: The docker_registry_setup task requires deploying a secure private Docker registry at registry.acme.local:5443 with admin credentials (admin/RegistryAdmin2024) in project directory /home/ga/projects/registry-setup. Three application images must be migrated: acme-api:latest to registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0, acme-frontend:latest to registry.acme.local:5443/acme/web-frontend:v3.0.1, and acme-proxy:latest to registry.acme.local:5443/acme/reverse-proxy:v1.0.0. All data is task-specific synthetic data created for this benchmark.
